samples.xml_description:
Implement a multi-bit MUX-based synchronizer. The data_en input is synchronous to clk_a and the data_in input is constant during the period when data_en=1. So, sample the data_in when data_en=1 and synchronize it to clk_b. The data change frequency of data_in is very low. The change interval between two adjacent data is at least 10 clk_b clock cycles. Note that the data_en is sampled at clk_b and then the value is transferred to clk_a. So, the timing diagram should be synchronized to clk_b. Clock signal A. Clock signal B. Active-low reset signal A. Active-low reset signal B. Input data signal. Input enable signal. Output data signal. 0 1 0 1 1

Implement a multi-bit MUX-based synchronizer.

The data_en input is synchronous to clk_a and the data_in input is constant during the period when data_en=1. So, sample the data_in when data_en=1 and synchronize it to clk_b. The data change frequency of data_in is very low. The change interval between two adjacent data is at least 10 clk_b clock cycles.

Note that the data_en is sampled at clk_b and then the value is transferred to clk_a. So, the timing diagram should be synchronized to clk_b.
